description: PRD-12 · P9.2 2 P0 内容审核域 · 13 stories(域 ⑦ TrendingItem × 6 · LD-A-5 硬闸门 + 域 ⑧ DeepLearning × 6 · PII 扫描 + violation 累计 + 收官 × 1)· 派生 ADMIN §3.4 + §8.4 + DATA-MODEL §13.6.D + §13.6.E + AGENTS §10 LD-A-5 · D-079~088 10 LD · 21+ anti_patterns 8 类(继承 6 + 新增 LD-A-5 worker + PII detect critical)· seed 详细度 1162 行 tasks/prd-12.md

userStories.title: trending_review_queue + trending_takedown + auto_review_rules 3 schema · foundation
userStories.description: 作为开发者 · 需要 3 张 admin 表(trending_review_queue + trending_takedown + auto_review_rules)严格按 DATA-MODEL §13.6.D · manual_admin_rls + audit-admin-rls-tables 同步 · zod schema · 这是域 ⑦ 5+ 下游 + 域 ⑧ 模式继承基础。
acceptanceCriteria: prisma/schema.prisma 加 3 model 严格按 DATA-MODEL §13.6.D 行 3253-3320 · TrendingReviewQueue(sourcePlatform/sourceItemId/sourceUrl/rawContent Json/fetchedAt/autoScanResult Json/autoVerdict/status/reviewerAdminId?/reviewedAt?/rejectReason?/trendingItemId?)+ @@unique([sourcePlatform,sourceItemId]) + 4 indexes
TrendingTakedown(trendingItemId/reason/takedownByAdminId?/takedownAt/hasAppeal/appealResolution?/appealResolvedAt?)+ 2 indexes
AutoReviewRule(ruleType/ruleKey/ruleValue Json/enabled/updatedByAdminId/updatedAt)+ @@unique([ruleType,ruleKey]) + 1 index
pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_trending_review_tables · migration 含 3 CREATE TABLE + indexes
manual_admin_rls.sql 加 3 行 ALTER TABLE DISABLE RLS · psql 实测 relrowsecurity=f
scripts/audit-admin-rls-tables.sh 列表加 3 表 · 含 '域⑦ TrendingItem 审核' 注释
apps/api/src/schemas/admin/trending-review.schema.ts zod schema · 3 schema 严格 export · status / autoVerdict enum 与 model 一致
pnpm audit:admin-rls-tables · 16/16 admin tables RLS=false 0 mismatches(13 PRD-10/11 + 3 新)
单元测试 9+ test 覆盖 enum 校验 + 必填字段 + JSON 类型
pnpm test 全过 · pnpm typecheck 0 error · audit-redlines-admin ALL PASS
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: 新加 admin 表必同步加到 audit-admin-rls-tables.sh
anti_patterns.antipattern: 只 ALTER TABLE DISABLE RLS · 漏改 audit script 列表(TD-039/042 类型)

anti_patterns.source_story: zod schema enum vs prisma comment
anti_patterns.lesson: zod enum 跟 prisma String comment 严格 1:1
anti_patterns.antipattern: zod ['auto_approved','auto_rejected'] · prisma 'auto_approved'|'auto_rejected'|'needs_review'
anti_patterns.correct: zod 跟 prisma 完全一致 enum + 所有 status 全列

anti_patterns.lesson: JSON 字段用 Prisma.InputJsonValue · 不用 any
anti_patterns.antipattern: rawContent: any · 类型不安全

userStories.title: TrendingScraper worker 接入 review queue · LD-A-5 硬闸门
userStories.description: 作为开发者 · 改 TrendingScraper worker · 抓回不再 prisma.trendingItem.create · 而写入 trending_review_queue · LD-A-5 enforce + 自动 banned-word/pii scan + autoVerdict 三态。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/workers/trending-scraper/worker.ts(若 .gitkeep 转真实现)· 抓回数据写 prisma.trendingReviewQueue.create({...})
★ grep verify: grep -r 'prisma.trendingItem.create' apps/api/src/workers/trending-scraper/ → 必须 0 命中(LD-A-5 验证)
apps/api/src/services/admin/content-review/trending-auto-verdict.service.ts · 计算 autoVerdict · 命中违禁词→auto_rejected · 0 hit + 抽样未中→auto_approved · 抽样中或偏门→needs_review
@@unique([sourcePlatform, sourceItemId]) 防重复 · catch P2002 + log warn 不阻塞
scanResult 空 / null · autoVerdict default 'needs_review'(保守 · D-081)
BullMQ attempts:3 + failed event 写 admin_audit_log eventCategory='system_alert' eventType='scraper_enqueue_failed'
审计 write eventCategory='data_mutation' eventType='scraper_enqueue'(system actor · actorAdminId=0 actorRole='system')
单元测试 worker · 8+ test 覆盖 autoVerdict 三态 / 重复防御 / 失败 retry / autoScanResult Json 写入
单元测试 trending-auto-verdict.service · 5+ test
pnpm test 全过 · pnpm typecheck 0 error · audit-redlines-admin ALL PASS
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: TrendingScraper/FileParser worker 必经 review queue · 不直接入主表
anti_patterns.antipattern: prisma.trendingItem.create({}) in workers/trending-scraper/  或  prisma.deepLearningArchive.create({}) in workers/file-parser/
anti_patterns.correct: prisma.trendingReviewQueue.create({...}) 或 prisma.deepLearnReviewQueue.create({...}) · approve procedure 才入主表

anti_patterns.lesson: scanResult 空时 autoVerdict 默认 needs_review 保守 · 不 auto_approved
anti_patterns.antipattern: if (!scanResult) autoVerdict = 'auto_approved' 默认放行
anti_patterns.correct: if (!scanResult || criticalHits>=1) autoVerdict = 'auto_rejected' · else if (samplingMissed) 'auto_approved' · else 'needs_review'

anti_patterns.lesson: @@unique 触发 P2002 catch + log warn · 不阻塞 scraper
anti_patterns.antipattern: throw e P2002 → BullMQ 重试无限
anti_patterns.correct: try {} catch (e) { if (e.code === 'P2002') logger.warn(...) else throw }

userStories.title: 违禁词库 + PII 库 service · isMock 默认 true · D-077 严格复用
userStories.description: 作为开发者 · 2 个外部审核 service · BannedWordService(stub 词库 20+ 词 · 真启 PRR)+ PIIDetectionService(4 regex 本地处理 · 不调外部 API · 隐私)· isMock 默认 true。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/services/admin/content-review/banned-word.service.ts · class BannedWordService · constructor 默认 isMock = process.env.BANNED_WORD_ENABLE !== 'true'
isMock=true · 内置 mockDictionary 20+ 词(政治 5 / 暴力 5 / 色情 5 / 赌博 5)· scan 用 String.includes 简单匹配
isMock=false + empty webhookUrl · 抛 ConfigurationError 服务启动 fail-fast · 同 DingtalkService 模式
isMock=false + URL · fetch POST · 失败 fall back 'needs_review' 保守(不 auto_approved)
apps/api/src/services/admin/content-review/pii-detection.service.ts · class PIIDetectionService · 4 regex(ID_CARD/PHONE_CN/EMAIL/BANK_CARD)· detect 方法返 {idCards/phones/emails/bankCards/total}
redact 方法 · 替换为 [ID-REDACTED]/[PHONE-REDACTED]/[EMAIL-REDACTED]/[CARD-REDACTED] · 给 audit + UI 显示用
2 service export singleton 便于跨模块复用
.env.example 加 BANNED_WORD_ENABLE + BANNED_WORD_API_URL 注释
单元测试 banned-word · 8+ test(isMock × ENABLE × ConfigurationError × scan)
单元测试 pii-detection · 10+ test(4 regex × empty/single/multi/redact)
pnpm test 全过 · pnpm typecheck 0 error · audit-redlines-admin ALL PASS
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: 外部 service 默认 isMock=true · 真启走 .env.production 显式
anti_patterns.antipattern: const svc = new BannedWordService('hardcode-url') 默认真发
anti_patterns.correct: isMock = process.env.BANNED_WORD_ENABLE !== 'true'  默认 mock + ConfigurationError fail-fast 当真启缺 URL

anti_patterns.lesson: audit payloadHash 必 redact 敏感字段(含 PII)
anti_patterns.antipattern: SHA-256(JSON.stringify(payload)) 含原 PII

anti_patterns.source_story: 真启 API 失败 default
anti_patterns.lesson: 外部 API fetch 失败 fall back needs_review 保守
anti_patterns.antipattern: catch (e) { return { autoVerdict: 'auto_approved' } } 默认放行
anti_patterns.correct: catch (e) { logger.warn(e); return { autoVerdict: 'needs_review', error: e.message } }

list · zod(page/pageSize/statusFilter/platformFilter/dateRange/autoVerdictFilter)· $transaction + SET LOCAL · 分页 + filter · 写 audit data_query/list_trending_review_queue
detail · 输入 queueId · 返完整 rawContent + autoScanResult + 链路追溯(trendingItemId 若已通过)
approve mutation · $transaction · update queue.status='approved' + create trending_items + update queue.trendingItemId(原子 · 防 inconsistency)+ audit data_mutation/trending_review_approve

reject mutation · zod input(queueId, rejectReason min 5)· status='rejected' + audit trending_review_reject

approve 已 approved · 抛 ValidationError · reject 已 rejected · 同 · approve 已有 trendingItemId · 抛 防双重入库
batchAction queueIds > 100 · 抛 ValidationError
readonly_admin · approve/reject/batchAction/configRules 全 403 · 仅 list/detail
adminRouter index.ts 挂载 reviewTrending: reviewTrendingRouter
audit-admin-rls.ts AST 应 ≥ 44 procedure(累计 38 + 6)0 violations
单元测试 30+ test 覆盖 list filter / detail / approve(双重检测)/ reject / batchAction(>100 拒)/ configRules super_admin only / 各鉴权
pnpm test 全过 · pnpm typecheck 0 error · audit-redlines ALL PASS

userStories.title: reviewDeepLearn UI part 1 · 列表 + 详情抽屉 · P-8 拆 1/2
userStories.description: 内容审核员 / super_admin · /admin/reviewDeepLearn · 列表 + 抽屉 framework · 文件 metadata + autoScanResult + redact text 预览 + 用户违规历史。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/admin/src/pages/reviewDeepLearn/index.tsx 替换 placeholder · 主页面 part 1 · admin-routes metadata.prd: 12 + git rm placeholder
ReviewDeepLearnFilters.tsx · userIdFilter / statusFilter / autoVerdictFilter / fileMimeFilter / dateRange · debounce 300ms
ReviewDeepLearnTable.tsx · DenseTable · 列(queueId/userId/fileName/fileSize/autoVerdict/status/uploadedAt/操作)· virtualScroll
DeepLearnReviewDrawer.tsx · 右侧抽屉 6 段 · 基本信息 + 文件 metadata + autoScanResult(PII / 违禁词命中高亮)+ 解析 text 预览 redact 显示 + 用户当前 violation count + 历史 archiveId 链路
OverviewCards.tsx · 顶部 3 数字 [待审核/命中 PII/命中违禁]
列表空 · 显示 '暂无待审核 · 用户上传后会自动入队'
text 预览 > 5KB · 默认折叠 + 展开按钮 lazy render
useSearchParams filter URL 持久化
ErrorBoundary fallback · pnpm typecheck 0 error
admin/reviewDeepLearn dev server 200 · agent-browser 打开 / 点列表行 → 抽屉 6 段 visible / console 0 error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: reviewDeepLearn UI part 2 · 文件预览 + 用户违规累计 Tab · P-8 拆 2/2
userStories.description: part 2 · FilePreviewPanel(PDF iframe stub / Word fallback / TXT MD CSV inline)+ UserViolationsTab(高违规用户列表)+ BanUploaderDialog(super_admin 直批 / admin pending)。
acceptanceCriteria: FilePreviewPanel.tsx · 根 fileMime · PDF iframe stub · Word fallback '预览见 PRR · 当前显示解析 text' · TXT/MD inline 显示(redact)· CSV 简单 <table> 渲染
UserViolationsTab.tsx · 高违规用户列表(count >= 3)· DenseTable · 列(userId/email/violationType/count/lastViolationAt/suspendedAt/操作)· readonly_admin 仅查
BanUploaderDialog.tsx · reason 文本框 min 10 + 提交 reviewDeepLearn.banUploader · super_admin 直批 / admin pending · 显示 '已提交等审批' for admin
index.tsx 集成 part 2 · Tab 切换 [待审核/已批准/已驳回/用户违规累计]
readonly_admin · 隐藏 [封禁上传] 按钮 + UserViolationsTab 仅查
fileMime 不支持预览 · 显示 '预览见 PRR · 当前查看 metadata + autoScanResult'
reason < 10 字符 · 前端 disabled + 红字
suspended user 重复 banUploader · 前端 disabled
agent-browser · 切 Tab [用户违规累计] · 看高违规用户列表 · 点 [封禁上传] → Dialog → 提交 → toast(super_admin '冻结成功' / admin '已提交')
console 0 error · pnpm typecheck 全过
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.antipattern: 原 PII 入 audit/UI
anti_patterns.correct: redact 后 hash + redact 显示

anti_patterns.correct: S3 URL 跨域时显示 fallback + '预览功能见 PRR'

userStories.title: violation-detection cron + 自动暂停上传 + index.ts wire · ★ Diff-3 验证
userStories.description: BullMQ cron 每日 04:00 跑 detectViolationThresholds · count >= 3 警告 · count >= 5 自动 trigger banUploader 申请 · 严格 wire 到 index.ts(PRD-11 US-009 教训 + Diff-3 验证)。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/jobs/admin/violation-detection.job.ts · BullMQ cron pattern '0 4 * * *' tz 'Asia/Shanghai' jobId 'violation-detection-recurring'(错峰 KPI 00 / cost 15 / anomaly 5:00)

apps/api/src/services/admin/content-review/violation-detection.service.ts · detectViolationThresholds · 查 user_violation_log count >= 3 + 未 suspended · 写 admin_audit_log security_alert/user_violation_warning
count >= 5 + 未 suspended · 自动触发 banUploader 申请走 Approval Gates stub(super_admin 直批 / admin pending · 同 US-009 模式)· system actor
★ apps/api/src/index.ts 加 scheduleViolationDetection() 调用(line ~325+ 后)· import + await + logger.info('violation_detection_cron.registered')
★ grep verify: grep 'scheduleViolationDetection' apps/api/src/index.ts · ≥ 2 命中(import + call)· Diff-3 plan-check 2.6.15 自动 catch
dedupe per (userId, violationType) per day · 通过 adminAuditLog.findFirst({eventType:'user_violation_warning',targetUserId,createdAt:{gte:todayStart}}) · 同 cost-anomaly US-015 模式
BullMQ attempts:3 + failed event 写 admin_audit_log eventCategory='system_alert' eventType='violation_cron_failed'
isMock DingtalkService stub 复用(D-077)· 真启 PRR
count = 5 但已 suspended · skip · 不重复 ban
单元测试 violation-detection.service · 10+ test 覆盖 count 阈值 / dedupe / suspended skip / 5+ 触发 ban 申请
单元测试 violation-detection.job · 7+ test
pnpm test 全过 · pnpm typecheck 0 error · audit-redlines ALL PASS
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: cron schedule 必 wire index.ts
anti_patterns.antipattern: scheduleX() 0 调用 · cron 不 fire

anti_patterns.lesson: BullMQ cron 必加 tz: 'Asia/Shanghai' + jobId 防 double-fire
anti_patterns.antipattern: {pattern: '0 4 * * *'} 默认 UTC + 漏 jobId

anti_patterns.lesson: 同 user 同 violationType 同日仅告警 1 次 · 防扰民
anti_patterns.antipattern: cron 每跑都 audit · 1 user 多次告警

userStories.title: ★ 收官 · adminRouter index 挂载确认 + admin-routes prd: 12 + 删 2 placeholder + verify-prd-12.sh 9 段
userStories.description: 收官 · adminRouter index 确认挂载 reviewTrending + reviewDeepLearn · admin-routes 2 路由 prd: 12 · 删 2 placeholder · 写 verify-prd-12.sh 9 段含 LD-A-5 grep 防线。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/trpc/routers/admin/index.ts 确认挂载 'reviewTrending: reviewTrendingRouter, reviewDeepLearn: reviewDeepLearnRouter'(US-004+US-009 已加 · 此处 verify)
apps/admin/src/lib/admin-routes.ts 2 路由 metadata.prd 改 12(/admin/reviewTrending + /admin/reviewDeepLearn)
git rm 2 placeholder.tsx · apps/admin/src/pages/admin/placeholder/{reviewTrending,reviewDeepLearn}.tsx

scripts/verify-prd-12.sh 9 段 self-test · §1 workspace · §2 RLS 双向(18/18 admin RLS=false + 15/15 main RLS=true)· §3 audit-redlines ALL PASS · §4 audit-admin-rls AST ≥ 50 procedure 0 violations · §5 PRD-12 文件存在 check · §6 2 placeholder 已删 + 2 路由 prd: 12 · §7 ★ LD-A-5 grep multi-layer(trending-scraper 0 命中 prisma.trendingItem.create + file-parser 0 命中 prisma.deepLearningArchive.create + approve procedure 各 1 命中)· §8 admin-integration 2 URL 200 · §9 typecheck + lint
chmod +x scripts/verify-prd-12.sh · 跑 bash scripts/verify-prd-12.sh · ≥ 30 PASS / 0 FAIL
verify-prd-12.sh fast mode 仅 skip e2e + 浏览器烟测(类 verify-prd-11)· keep 静态 audit
agent-browser 打开 /admin/reviewTrending + /admin/reviewDeepLearn 全 200 · DenseTable virtualScroll 流畅
8 业务页(PRD-11 6 + PRD-12 2)全部 visible 在 sidebar · 切换均无 console error
Typecheck passes
